text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's just before the autumn Tenno Sho, and
Satono Diamond is heading into her first fall G1
race.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Stay sharp, Dia! It's the Kikuka Sho, the last of
the Triple Crown races. It's the moment of truth...
but also your big chance!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
I know. I remember how you ran in it last year,
Kita. You were so determined to see it through to
the very end...

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
I can see the path clearly because you showed me
the way. I won't let even the worst of luck stop me
this time!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
I am Satono Diamond! I was born to make the
Satonos' dream a reality!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: And, on that day...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: ...history was rewritten.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
She's done it! Satono Diamond has won the race!
Bad luck's got nothing on her! She's finally
claimed a G1 victory!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
The name of the prominent Satono Group has
been immortalized in racing history!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Thank you all for your support. At long last, I was
able to make a meaningful contribution to the
world of Umamusume.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Satono will continue to be your valued partner on
and off the racecourse, for racing, support aid,
and business.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Satono Diamond absolutely nails the winner's
interview and carries her mantle as the
representative of the Satono Group with great
dignity.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: That night...

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Awww yeah! Yes! YAHOOOOO!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Dia, Dia! You did it! YOU REALLY DID IT!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
You won a G1 race! You've dreamt of doing that
for so long, and you finally did it! You won the
Kikuka Sho!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
We're celebrating tonight! No, one night won't be
nearly enough! Raaaaah!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She's even happier for her than if she won herself.
Her cheers are more akin to shrieks of delight, to
be honest. Meanwhile...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Satono Diamond has maintained her dignified
demeanor this whole time, but she hasn't said a
word. Then...

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Sniff... Hic...

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Sniffle... Waaah!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Dia...

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: I wooon, I did it... I actually won...

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
But I lost so many races... I felt so bad about how
pathetic and useless I was...

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: But today, I won! I won, Kita! Trainer! I wooon!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Waaaaah!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Dia is... crying? She's... She's really crying...

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Sniffle! DIAAAAAA!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The two embrace each other tightly, spirits
uniting as one.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Bound by destiny, they fought together across
seasons, until finally, Satono Diamond achieved
the dream she had long held onto.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: And so, the stage shifts to the autumn Tenno Sho.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Well, hello, hello! ♪ It's your fav Umadol, Falco,
with today's weather!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Let's see, the skies over the autumn Tenno Sho
are...

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
What in the world?! What's the gray swirly thing
in the sky?! Is that a typhoon?! The stage wouldn't
last two minutes if it comes this way!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: SSH! WHOOOOOSH!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Smart Falcon isn't exaggerating for views. This is
the worst weather ever recorded for the autumn
Tenno Sho. We're in the middle of a literal
maelstrom.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I leave the stands to inspect the track, but the
whole thing is obscured in a rainy haze. The
runners will have near zero visibility.
choice_data_list: Are they really going to make them run in this?
Are they really going to make them run in this?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I mutter the words to myself, dismayed at the
sight before me.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Trainer, the conditions might be really bad, but...
I have to do this.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I glance over and find Kitasan Black looking not
at the track, but in a completely different
direction.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Do you see all the fans? They took the time to
come out here, but look how cold they are.
They're shivering like mad.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Not a single one of them is smiling. They're
gritting their teeth just so they won't chatter...

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Even so, they came. They're here to see me race.
And if that's what they're here for...

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Then that's what I'll give them! I'll give them a
race to remember, bad weather or not!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Seeing the fans braving the violent storm just for
the sake of watching her run sets Kitasan Black's
heart ablaze.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Dia fulfilled her dream of winning a G1 race. But I
still haven't made mine a reality...

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
My dream is to make everyone smile! And if I
want to grant that wish, then I'll have to pass this
trial with flying colors!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Still, the track looks like a real mess. How should I
even run in that muddy disaster so that the crowd
will feel entertained and smile?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Unless we show them a truly extraordinary race,
it'll be near impossible to keep the fans happy in
a torrential downpour.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
There's one thing that can possibly satisfy and
entertain the crowd in such bad conditions, and
only Kitasan Black is capable of pulling it off.
choice_data_list:
Charge through it all, poor conditions be
damned!

Charge through it all, poor conditions be
damned!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
You mean, just sprint through everything? Even
the potholes and mud swamps?
choice_data_list: Yeah! Take them on with no hesitation!
Yeah! Take them on with no hesitation!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Knowing Kitasan Black, she might really be strong
enough to brute force her way through even the
worst stretches.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
In fact, she might be the only one who can power
through the terrible track conditions with her
natural doggedness and grab victory!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
All right! I'll take your word for it! I'm not gonna
shy away from puddles or the inner lane, even if
it's all churned up!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
If Dia can break her curse, then I can beat this
typhoon! This is for the fans!
